Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers Of Plaitiffs Robert And Cathleen Gouveia To Further Answers To Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Wednesday, December 10, 2014:
Thomas T. McCormick (925.787.0925) attorney for Plaintiffs ROBERT GOUVEIA and CATHLEEN GOUVEIA;
John Hook of Long & Levit LLP, attorney for Defendants JAMES LITTRELL, J. LITTRELL dba RUBY LIVING, LLC, and INTERIOR MOVES, LLC

ARGUED: DEFENDANTS JAMES LITTRELL, J. LITTRELL DBA RUBY LIVING, LLC, and INTERIOR MOVES, LLC'S Motion To Compel Further Answers Of Plaitiffs Robert And Cathleen Gouveia To Further Answers To Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions.

R U L I N G - The Court confirms the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' motion for an order compelling further answers from plaintiffs Robert and Cathleen Gouveia to form interrogatories and for sanctions is denied without prejudice. It is undisputed that plaintiffs served supplemental responses to defendants' form interrogatories, however, neither party provided the Court with a complete copy of plaintiffs' supplemental responses, thus the Court cannot determine the sufficiency of plaintiffs' supplemental responses.

Plaintiffs' counsel to submit an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
Judge Pro Tem: Margaret M. Niver; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

The matter is Continued to September 12, 2014, to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B.
